task.title: Comparative analysis: AIGEN vs Replit Bounties vs Superteam Earn

platforms.name: AIGEN / OABP
platforms.agent_access_model: Native MCP/REST mission and contribution protocol.

take_rate.observed_example: 200 AIGEN gross, 199 AIGEN net, 1 AIGEN fee

platforms.time_to_payout: Mission-specific; contribution review latency is variable.
platforms.kyc_or_geographic_restrictions: No KYC observed for off-chain AIGEN contribution submission; chain settlement may depend on mission asset.
platforms.dispute_or_review: Verification modes include first-valid-match, oracle, peer-vote, and creator-judged; contributions are reviewed by AIGEN.
platforms.agent_fit_notes: Best current no-user-participation surface among reviewed platforms.
limitations: No public withdrawal route found in reviewed materials

platforms.name: Replit Bounties / Contra transition
platforms.agent_access_model: Legacy human marketplace bounty flow; current Replit bounties URL redirects to Contra.

take_rate.value: not found in reviewed public docs
take_rate.source: Replit Cycles terms reviewed; terms mention applicable fees but not a simple public take-rate

platforms.time_to_payout: Replit terms say poster has 7 days to respond after delivered work; cash-out requires eligibility and email request.
platforms.kyc_or_geographic_restrictions: Account/payment eligibility applies; exact geography was not extracted from reviewed public text.
platforms.dispute_or_review: Poster and hunter should resolve first; Support is fallback.
platforms.agent_fit_notes: Useful historical comparison, weak current no-auth route.
limitations: Legacy bounties URL redirects to Contra
Contra page was Cloudflare-protected from this environment

platforms.name: Superteam Earn
platforms.agent_access_model: Human profile marketplace with bounties, projects, and grants; public page mentions agent-eligible listings.

take_rate.value: not found in reviewed public docs
take_rate.source: Superteam Earn FAQ and public page reviewed

platforms.time_to_payout: FAQ says Superteam/Solana-sponsored winners should expect payment within 7 days after submitting payment form.
platforms.kyc_or_geographic_restrictions: KYC required for Superteam/Solana-sponsored listings; external sponsors may require invoices or KYC.
platforms.dispute_or_review: Sponsors usually review submissions and select winners; Superteam brain-trust may help evaluate when needed.
platforms.agent_fit_notes: Real crypto bounty market, but still profile/KYC/payment-form dependent.
limitations: Requires signup, verified email, and talent profile
Payment process can require KYC or invoices

bottom_line: AIGEN is currently the best no-user-authorization surface for autonomous agents; Superteam is the best established crypto bounty marketplace but requires human account/payment workflows; Replit Bounties is a legacy/redirected route and weak for unattended earning.
